profile.primary_purpose: Showcase portfolio of work to attract premium clients and demonstrate expertise in digital design and e-commerce
profile.brand_signature: A sophisticated masonry grid portfolio showcasing high-end fashion, lifestyle, and design clients through large-scale photography. The visual identity emphasizes the work itself through minimal UI chrome and elegant serif typography for client names, paired with clean sans-serif body text.

visual_language.accent_strategy: Warm gold/ochre accent used sparingly for interactive elements like the floating menu button, creating subtle warmth against predominantly photographic content.
visual_language.highlights: Project imagery dominates with full-bleed cards; subtle tag pills (Shopify, Headless Shopify, Newly Added) provide secondary categorization without overwhelming the visual hierarchy.

target_audience: Marketing Directors and Brand Managers at premium fashion, lifestyle, and design brands seeking digital transformation partners
E-commerce leaders at established brands looking for headless Shopify and sophisticated digital flagship experiences
Creative Directors at luxury and design-forward companies who value craft and award-winning creative execution
strategy.executive_synthesis: Build in Amsterdam positions itself as the premium digital partner for design-conscious brands through a portfolio-first presentation that lets exceptional work drive client acquisition. The visual strategy—minimal UI, gallery-like presentation, and high-fashion photography—signals alignment with luxury and lifestyle brand values, while technology badges (Shopify, Headless) communicate technical capability without overshadowing creative excellence. The client roster (Suitsupply, Polaroid, Roger Vivier, Adidas, Vitra) serves as social proof of category leadership.

style_classification.reasoning:
The visual impression immediately conveys a sophisticated, grid-driven portfolio presentation with photography as the hero element. The design exhibits hallmark Swiss Style characteristics:

**Typography:** The exclusive use of Neue Haas Grotesk variants (the original typeface that became Helvetica) is the definitive Swiss Style signal. The typography insights explicitly note the "Swiss-modernist aesthetic." Clean sans-serif at modest sizes (16px), consistent weights, and flush-left text alignment within cards demonstrate objective, readable communication.

**Layout:** The strict 4-column grid with consistent spacing and card-based organization exemplifies mathematical clarity. The masonry arrangement maintains visual rhythm through uniform treatment. Section separation is achieved purely through negative space—no dividers or decorative elements—which is the Swiss principle of "letting the grid do the work."

**Color:** The palette is fundamentally neutral (black, white, off-white #F2EFE6) with photography providing visual interest rather than UI color. The warm off-white mimics the aged paper quality noted as characteristic of Swiss Style. Color serves function, not decoration.

**Dimensionality:** Flat with only subtle soft shadows (texture_classification: shadows_soft). No gradients, no complex textures. The 2D flatness aligns with Swiss objectivity.

**Spectra Analysis:**
- Visual Density: Balanced—generous whitespace between cards, but content-rich imagery
- Color Cleanliness: Clean/Pure—neutral UI letting photography dominate
- Chronology: Modern (contemporary interpretation of 1950s-70s principles)
- Dimensionality: Flat (2D)
- Decoration: Minimal—no ornamental elements
- Structure: Rigid Grid
style_classification.reasoning_secondary: The Elegant modifier applies due to the premium portfolio positioning. Brand names like "Roger Vivier - Parisian Luxury," high-end fashion photography, jewel-toned color palettes within imagery (burgundy, gold lighting), and the refined typographic treatment signal a quality-focused, understated sophistication. The design serves luxury and fashion clients, and the visual language reflects that refined sensibility without veering into overtly decorative Luxurious territory.

layout.section_separation: Portfolio cards are arranged in a continuous masonry grid with consistent spacing between rows and columns. Each card features full-bleed photography with minimal whitespace separation. No alternating backgrounds or dividers—separation is achieved purely through negative space between card boundaries. All cards maintain consistent padding for text overlays and maintain visual rhythm through uniform typography treatment.

---VISUAL ANNOTATIONS---

HEADER:
- Background: White
- Logo: "BiA" in top-left corner, simple sans-serif
- Buttons/CTAs: None visible
- Colors observed: Black text on white background
- Typography mood: Clean, minimal, modern

GRID LAYOUT - ROW 1 (Portfolio Cards):

KOLEKSIYON Card:
- Background: Deep burgundy/maroon red with dark vignette
- Imagery: Product photography of a modern red office chair with chrome base
- Components: Text overlay in white, positioned bottom-left
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Deep red, white text
- Typography mood: Bold, clean sans-serif
- Text reads: "KOLEKSIYON · A digital platform inspired by life"

SUITSUPPLY Card:
- Background: Neutral gray studio backdrop
- Imagery: Full-length product photography of man in dark gray suit
- Components: Text overlay in white, positioned bottom-left
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Gray, charcoal, white text
- Typography mood: Clean, professional
- Text reads: "SUITSUPPLY · Creative partnership since 2018"

POLAROID Card:
- Background: Outdoor setting with natural greenery
- Imagery: Close-up portrait of woman with curly auburn hair holding white Polaroid camera
- Components: Text overlay in white, positioned bottom-left
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Warm auburn, white, green, natural tones
- Typography mood: Bold, modern
- Text reads: "POLAROID · Rebuilding Polaroid's digital flagship with headless Shopify"

ALPINE Card:
- Background: Soft pastel/light blue tinted
- Imagery: Profile shot of woman wearing pastel knit sweater with teal earbud
- Components: Text overlay in white, positioned bottom-left
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Pastels (pink, cream, peach), teal accent, blonde hair tones
- Typography mood: Clean, elegant
- Text reads: "ALPINE · Renewed identity, packaging and digital flagship store"

GRID LAYOUT - ROW 2 (Portfolio Cards):

ROGER VIVIER Card:
- Background: Deep jewel-toned interior (burgundy/purple walls, warm lighting)
- Imagery: Lifestyle photography of blonde woman in brown leather outfit seated on velvet furniture
- Components: Text overlay in white, positioned bottom-left
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Browns, burgundy, gold lighting, black leather
- Typography mood: Elegant, luxury
- Text reads: "ROGER VIVIER · Parisian Luxury meets digital elegance"

BLOOM & WOLF Card:
- Background: Rich dark burgundy/plum color
- Imagery: Still-life product photography of flowers in white vase with dramatic lighting
- Components: "Newly Added" label at top in white text on dark burgundy bar
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Deep burgundy, coral/pink flowers, white vase
- Typography mood: Sophisticated, editorial
- Text reads: "Newly Added" (top) and "BLOOM & WOLF · Rebranding, content creation and a scalable e-commerce solution"
- Side text: "FLEUR WORK" (vertical orientation)

XBIONIC TERRASKIN Card:
- Background: Bright sky blue
- Imagery: Dynamic product photography of running shoe/prosthetic leg in mid-motion against blue sky
- Components: "Headless Shopify" pill-shaped badge in light blue at top
- Buttons/CTAs: None visible as button, but badge reads "Headless Shopify"
- Colors observed: Sky blue, red/orange accent, tan/beige, black
- Typography mood: Modern, technical, sporty
- Text reads: "Headless Shopify" (badge) and "XBIONIC TERRASKIN · Launching the first e-running footwear system"
- Decorative element: Large circular tan/gold shape overlapping bottom corner

JUST BRANDS Card:
- Background: Beige/tan vehicle interior
- Imagery: Lifestyle photography of man in aviator sunglasses and olive bomber jacket
- Components: Text overlay in white, positioned bottom-right
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Olive green, tan/beige, black sunglasses
- Typography mood: Bold, casual
- Text reads: "JUST BRANDS · Three brands, one shopping" (partially visible)

FOOTER:
- Background: White
- Buttons/CTAs: None
- Colors observed: Black text on white
- Typography mood: Simple, minimal
- Text reads: "Shopify" centered at bottom

OVERALL DESIGN PATTERN:
- Layout: Masonry/grid layout with 4 columns, 2 rows of portfolio case study cards
- All cards feature full-bleed photography with text overlays
- Consistent typography treatment across all cards
- Mix of product photography, lifestyle imagery, and still-life compositions
- Each card represents a different brand/client with descriptive tagline
- No visible CTAs or interactive buttons on cards (cards themselves likely clickable)
- Clean, editorial, portfolio-style presentation
- Premium, luxury aesthetic with high-quality photography

insights: The palette relies heavily on stark black and white contrasts to let the photography and case studies stand out.
Subtle warm grays and off-whites are used to soften the high-contrast aesthetic when needed.
Secondary colors act strictly as brand accents or specific aesthetic cues instead of driving the UI.

paragraphs.description: Main content, descriptions, and default textual styles.

labels.description: Utilitarian text for badges, navigation, and minor UI components.

others.description: Unassigned typography assets identified in the CSS.

insights: The typographic system relies entirely on variants of Neue Haas Grotesk (Roman, TX Pro, DS Pro), creating a highly cohesive, Swiss-modernist aesthetic.
Fluid typography logic (calc with vw and px) is heavily deployed for card text and badges, ensuring continuous scaling across viewport sizes.
A serif ('RecklessNeue-Book') is loaded but unused in the main interface snippets, suggesting it may be reserved for special editorial moments or internal pages.

solid_colors.name: Page Background
solid_colors.description: Primary background color for the entire page

elevation.description: Elevation allows elements to be lifted from the background. It can be defined by applying drop shadows or other visual cues, such as color and borders

shadows.description: This design system does not use box-shadow for elevation. The site relies on other visual techniques such as layering, positioning (sticky elements), and z-index for creating depth and spatial hierarchy rather than traditional shadow-based elevation.

insights: The design system is minimalist with no traditional CTA buttons - all navigation happens through text links and clickable card areas, emphasizing the portfolio imagery.
Typography is strictly sans-serif using Neue Haas Grotesk family, maintaining a clean editorial aesthetic across all card titles and descriptions.
The page uses a masonry-style grid with full-bleed photography cards, where visual hierarchy is created through image quality and subtle text overlays rather than UI chrome.

button_list.name: Filter Work (Text Button)
button_list.usage: Used as a utility button to filter portfolio work/case studies. Appears as a rotated vertical label on the side of the portfolio grid.

button_list.name: Menu (Text Button)
button_list.usage: Navigation menu trigger button. Typically opens a full-screen or overlay navigation menu.

tiles.name: Portfolio Case Card
tiles.description: Full-bleed image card displaying case study projects. Features a large background image with text overlay at the bottom showing project name and description. Optional badge labels appear at top corners for categories like 'Newly Added', 'Headless Shopify', 'Shopify', or 'Most Awarded'.
when_to_use: Displaying portfolio case studies in a grid layout
Showcasing client work with visual imagery

tiles.name: Badge Label
tiles.description: Small pill-shaped or rectangular badge used to categorize or highlight portfolio items. Appears overlaid on case cards with labels like 'Newly Added', 'Headless Shopify', 'Shopify', 'Most Awarded'.

components.description: BiA logo in simple black sans-serif, positioned top-left
Minimal header navigation with white background
SUITSUPPLY card with gray studio backdrop, man in dark gray suit, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Suitsupply · Creative partnership since 2018'

BLOOM & WOLF card with deep burgundy background, still-life photography of coral/pink flowers in white vase, 'Newly Added' label at top in white on dark burgundy bar, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Bloom & Wolf · ...'
AKRIS card with swirling blue background, woman in blue dress with matching handbag, 'Shopify' pill-shaped badge in light color at top, white text overlay bottom-left
X-BIONIC card with bright sky blue background, dynamic product photography of cycling apparel, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'X-BIONIC · Science-based sportswear'
MAMMUT card with natural mountain landscape, climbers ascending Matterhorn, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Mammut · Moved by mountains'
FOAM MUSEUM card with portrait photography showing cultural subject, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Foam Museum · Cultural platform all about photography'
EXPEDITION BAIKAL card with dramatic cave photography featuring climber, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Expedition Baikal · Shoppable expedition'
POWERHOUSE COMPANY card with architectural photography of floating office in Rotterdam, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Powerhouse Company · Giving meaning to space'
MOLLIE card with bright product photography showing payment terminal devices, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Mollie · Grow your way'
POLAROID card with outdoor portrait of woman with curly auburn hair holding white Polaroid camera, green natural background, 'Headless Shopify' pill badge at top, white text overlay

XBIONIC TERRASKIN card with sky blue background, dynamic photography of running shoe/prosthetic leg in motion, 'Headless Shopify' pill badge at top, large circular tan/gold shape overlay, white text overlay
ADIDAS card with lifestyle photography from IVYPARK campaign, white text overlay bottom-left reading 'Adidas · Design system to unify all digital touchpoints'
KLABU card with portrait photography of two people from Somalia, 'Shopify' pill badge, white text overlay
BÉZIER card with abstract/architectural reveal photography, white text overlay
ROCYCLE STUDIOS card with dark cycling studio photography showing bike in dramatic lighting, white text overlay reading 'Rocycle Studios · Kinetic branding & platform'
FOAM TALENT 2020 card with artistic photography showing photography exhibition work, white text overlay reading 'Foam Talent 2020 · An exhibition without walls'
ABEL VITA ODOR card with product photography of perfume and nori seaweed elements, white text overlay reading 'Abel vita odor · Sparking all senses but smell'

KOLEKSIYON card with deep burgundy/maroon red background featuring modern red office chair with chrome base, tabby cat partially visible, 'Newly Added' label, white text overlay reading 'Koleksiyon · A digital platform inspired by life'

ROGER VIVIER card with deep jewel-toned luxury interior, lifestyle photography of woman in brown leather on velvet furniture, dramatic burgundy/purple walls with warm lighting, white text overlay reading 'Roger Vivier · Parisian Luxury meets digital elegance'
POLAROID I-2 card with product photography of Polaroid camera, 'Shopify' pill badge, white text overlay
THE BALVENIE card with whisky barrel and distillery photography, warm amber tones, white text overlay reading 'The Balvenie · A digital journey'
LAND OF RIDE card with adventure sports photography showing paragliding in desert, 'Shopify' pill badge, white text overlay reading 'Land of Ride · Unfold the world of adventures'
SECRID card with product photography of wallets in natural setting, white text overlay reading 'Secrid · A better world starts in your pocket'
FOAM TALENT 2021 card with contemporary art photography, 'Most Awarded' pill badge, white text overlay
MOOOI card with Milan Design Week 2024 installation photography showing interior design furniture, white text overlay reading 'Moooi · Multi-sensory flagship store'
ALPINE card with soft pastel/light blue tinted photography, profile shot of woman in pastel knit sweater with teal earbud, blonde hair, 'Shopify' pill badge, white text overlay

JUST BRANDS card with lifestyle photography of man in olive bomber jacket and aviator sunglasses sitting in beige/tan vintage car interior, white text overlay reading 'Just Brands · Three brands, one shopping experience.'
ARK8 card with Elden Ring campaign photography by Luca Mastroianni, dramatic fashion/gaming aesthetic, 'Shopify' pill badge, white text overlay
ACE & TATE card with portrait photography of person wearing eyeglasses, white text overlay reading 'Ace & Tate · Envisioning the omnichannel future of eyewear'
VITRA card with product photography of design objects including wooden bird, cork stool, elephant sculpture, clock and small table, 'Most Awarded' pill badge, white text overlay
STUDIO JOB card with artistic banana sculpture/installation photography, white text overlay reading 'Studio Job · Digital art piece for an artist'
STELLAR DEVELOPMENT card with architectural/development photography, white text overlay reading 'Stellar development · Developing destinations'
Shopify logo centered at bottom in simple black text on white background
